_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Evaluate and select ML platform tooling, producing architectural decision records with documented rationale and re-evaluation criteria.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Task AI-T-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-004 (LS, cosine: 0.504), OP-T-008 (OP, cosine: 0.453).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.598). Shared vocabulary: [evaluate]. NICE-only terms [developed, locally, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [architectural, criteria, decision, documented, evaluation, ml] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.901, R=0.863). P exceeds R by 0.038 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Evaluate locally developed tools" and "Evaluate and select ML platform tooling, producing architectural decision record" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.524 < STS 0.598 (gap -0.073). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [developed, locally, tools] and [architectural, criteria, decision] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.3%. Shared tokens: [evaluate]. NICE-only: [developed, locally, tools]. WIDAI-only: [architectural, criteria, decision, documented, evaluation, ml].
